title: Missing signer validation
description: Sensitive instructions must require a Signer or signer=true constraint.

title: Unchecked AccountInfo usage
description: Raw AccountInfo bypasses Anchor type and owner checks.

title: PDA seeds missing bump validation
description: PDAs must validate canonical bump to prevent seed collisions.

title: Unsafe account close pattern
description: Manual lamport manipulation without Anchor close constraint.

title: Missing authority constraint
description: Authority accounts should use has_one or typed Signer binding.

title: Unvalidated CPI target
description: CPI calls must validate program IDs explicitly.

title: Missing mut on mutable account
description: Accounts written in handlers must be marked mut.

title: Untyped sysvar account
description: Sysvars should use typed Sysvar<T> wrappers.

title: Token account constraint mismatch
description: TokenAccounts need mint/authority binding constraints.

title: Unchecked account ownership
description: UncheckedAccount requires owner validation or CHECK docs.

title: init_if_needed without payer signer
description: init_if_needed must bind payer as Signer.

title: Zero-copy account without owner check
description: AccountLoader/zero-copy needs owner constraints.

title: Missing Rent sysvar for init
description: Init flows referencing space should consider Rent.

title: AccountLoader missing owner
description: AccountLoader should constrain program owner.

title: Potential admin instruction exposure
description: Admin-only instructions should require upgrade authority or admin signer.

title: Unbounded Vec in accounts
description: Large Vec accounts without max_len may enable DoS.

title: Loop in instruction handler
description: Loops in handlers can exceed compute budget.

title: Token mint missing freeze authority check
description: Mint operations should consider freeze authority risks.

title: invoke_signed without seed validation
description: invoke_signed must use validated seed slices.

title: Duplicate mutable accounts
description: Same account passed mut twice can cause logic bugs.

title: Unchecked arithmetic
description: Use checked_add/sub/mul for token amounts and balances.

title: Token-2022 extension unchecked
description: Token-2022 extensions need explicit constraint review.

title: Pubkey default / zero key
description: Pubkey::default() used as valid key.

title: Missing constraint on associated token
description: ATA derivations should validate wallet + mint.

title: Program unchecked in remaining accounts
description: remaining_accounts iteration without validation is risky.

title: Missing discriminator on custom account
description: Custom accounts should use Anchor discriminator (#[account]).
